questions.question_text: His illness got worse and worse. In the end he _____ go into hospital for an operation.

options.C: They must be helping sick people.

questions.question_text: I _____ to the doctor. I'm feeling much better.

options.B: I was called by her at seven

options.B: We didn't need to leave soon.

questions.question_text:

B: You _____ at home.

B: They _____ tremendous imaginations.

B: They _____ have your size.

I _____ go out than be stuck in bed.

B: Well, he _____ have had it this month, but now he is going to have it next month.

B: Yes, it could. It has got more skillful players.

options.A: could have used / should / have used
options.B: shouldn't have used / should / have used
options.C: might not use / should / be used

questions.question_text: He was so unsure of himself that he _____ even buy a box of chocolates without consulting his mother.
Before his illness he _____ anything but now he _____ very careful with his diet.

options.B: must have eaten / had to be
